sqlMap.create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS WeavePattern ( Idx INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, Name TEXT NOT NULL, Code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, RepeatX INTEGER NOT NULL, RepeatY INTEGER NOT NULL, Cells TEXT NOT NULL, WarpColors TEXT, WeftColors TEXT, WarpThickness TEXT, WeftThickness TEXT, WeaveMode TEXT NOT NULL, SavedAt TEXT NOT NULL );
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM WeavePattern WHERE Code = @code LIMIT 1;
sqlMap.update: UPDATE WeavePattern SET Name = @name, RepeatX = @repeatX, RepeatY = @repeatY, Cells = @cells, WarpColors = @warpColors, WeftColors = @weftColors, WarpThickness = @warpThickness, WeftThickness = @weftThickness, WeaveMode = @weaveMode, SavedAt = @savedAt WHERE Code = @code;
